name_it: Saint Anselm of Canterbury, bishop and doctor of the Church
name_en: Saint Anselm of Canterbury, bishop and doctor of the Church
name_es: Saint Anselm of Canterbury, bishop and doctor of the Church
name_pt: Saint Anselm of Canterbury, bishop and doctor of the Church
bio_en: Anselm of Canterbury OSB, also known as Anselm of Aosta after his birthplace and Anselm of Bec after his monastery, was an Italian Benedictine monk, abbot, philosopher, and theologian of the Catholic Church, who served as Archbishop of Canterbury from 1093 to 1109.
bio_it: Anselm of Canterbury OSB, also known as Anselm of Aosta after his birthplace and Anselm of Bec after his monastery, was an Italian Benedictine monk, abbot, philosopher, and theologian of the Catholic Church, who served as Archbishop of Canterbury from 1093 to 1109.
